name: outrider-recon
description: Autonomous agentic recon pipeline for authorized external red-team and bug-bounty. 81 capabilities across 11 skills covering subdomain enumeration, secret hunting, identity/SSO mapping, breach correlation, vulnerability prioritization, and attack-surface reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous recon pipeline for authorized red-team and bug-bounty.
interface.longDescription: 11 skills covering the full external recon lifecycle: methodology, asset discovery, web surface enumeration, identity/SSO mapping, secret/dork hunting, post-credential workflows, cloud/infrastructure, breach intelligence, analysis/reporting, and automated report generation. Operates as a senior recon analyst that plans, executes, pivots, and escalates without hand-holding.
defaultPrompt: Plan a 4-hour external recon on acme.com (in-scope bug bounty)
Found AKIA key in a public gist. Walk me through triage.
Audit target.com email security posture for spoof feasibility
